ogTitle: Topi Topi vs Torrington: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Topi Topi and Torrington.
heading: Topi Topi vs Torrington — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Topi Topi, New South Wales and Torrington, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Topi Topi has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Torrington (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Topi Topi or Torrington safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Topi Topi has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Torrington scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Topi Topi scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Torrington scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Topi Topi or Torrington?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Topi Topi has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
